description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>스턴</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>的几率使目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>晕眩</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>스턴</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>的几率使目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>晕眩</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> chance to inflict <color=#28d9ed>Stunned</color> on the target for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 확률로 대상을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 <color=#28d9ed>스턴</color> 상태로 만듭니다.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、対象に<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>スタン</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間付与する。
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>的几率使目标陷入<color=#28d9ed>晕眩</color>状态,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nAfter the caster takes their turn, has a <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> chance to Counterattack, until the caster's next turn.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n자신이 턴을 획득한 이후, 다음 턴 동안 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color>의 확률로 반격합니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n自分がターンを獲得した後、次のターンの間<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>の確率で反撃する。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n自身获得回合后,下一回合有<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>的几率发动反击。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nHas a <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> chance to reduce one target's <color=#28d9ed>Resilience</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color> when attacking.
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n공격 시 <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> 확률로 대상 한 명의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 저항</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n攻撃時、<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>の確率で対象単体の<color=#28d9ed>効果抵抗</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: (被动效果)\n攻击时,有<color=#28d9ed>20%</color>的几率使1名敌人的<color=#28d9ed>效果抵抗</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
